supportChannels.label: Call Us
supportChannels.description: Speak with a member services representative for help with your plan, claims, or benefits.

supportChannels.label: Live Chat
supportChannels.description: Chat online with a Horizon representative for quick answers to your questions.

supportChannels.label: Email Support
supportChannels.description: Send us an email and we'll respond within 1-2 business days.

supportChannels.label: 24/7 Nurse Line
supportChannels.description: Speak with a registered nurse anytime for health-related questions and guidance.
supportChannels.hoursOfOperation: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

supportChannels.label: Behavioral Health Line
supportChannels.description: Speak with a behavioral health specialist for referrals and support.

supportChannels.label: Pharmacy Help Desk
supportChannels.description: Get help with prescription coverage, mail order, and pharmacy-related questions.

emergencyNotice.title: Emergency?
emergencyNotice.message: If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911 or go to the nearest emergency room immediately.

mailingAddress.name: Horizon Blue Cross Blue Shield of New Jersey
